apps.title: Town in a Box
apps.why_it_matters: Town Box becomes convincing when every record can be traced to a real public meeting or civic video.
apps.search_intro: Search across real public meeting records to connect hearings, updates, and recurring issues.
apps.source_copy: Watch the original public source, then compare how Bonfyre turns it into a civic summary, search surface, and durable public trail.

apps.title: Shift Handoff
apps.why_it_matters: Handoff quality is only believable when the input sounds like a real rushed workplace exchange.
apps.search_intro: Search across real handoff recordings to see repeated risks and recurring task patterns.
apps.source_copy: Open the original public source, then compare it to the handoff board Bonfyre generates.

sources.title: Practice Nursing Hand-Off Report #1
sources.brief: Nursing handoff recording processed into a concise board of patient status, follow-up tasks, and escalation points.
